user.title: Samsung TV Max
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Samsung Smart TV.

pair.title: Pair with TV
pair.description:
Connecting to {host}.

If a pairing request appears on your TV, select **Allow** and click **Submit**.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TV. Check the IP address and that the TV is on.
error.unsupported_model: This TV model is not supported. Only Samsung Tizen (2016+) TVs are compatible.
error.unauthorized: The TV rejected the connection. Please allow the remote access request on the TV screen, then click Submit.
